title: Robin Ashford
content:
Chief Client Officer
People.ContactEmail rashford@mccarthy.ca
Robin is the Chief Client Officer at McCarthy Tétrault, based in the firm’s Toronto office. As a member of the leadership team, he oversees the firm’s Clients & Markets team, including functions such as business development, communications, research, and awards and rankings.
With more than two decades of experience working with professional services organizations in Canada and the UK, Robin is passionate about building and developing high-performing teams, promoting a culture of continuous growth and innovation. Working closely with McCarthy Tétrault’s senior leadership team, he leads the development and execution of outcome-focused marketing and communications strategies that strengthen and grow client relationships, and enhance and protect the firm’s brand positioning.
Before joining McCarthy Tétrault, Robin held senior leadership roles at MNP and PwC Canada. He has also contributed to the broader marketing and business community as a speaker at the CMO Toronto Summit, a judge for Desjardins’ Cooperathon Alpha Program, and is a board member and Chair of the Fundraising Committee for Moorelands Kids - one of Canada’s Top 100 Charities.
Robin holds a Bachelor of Arts in English from Queen Mary College, University of London, England.
